name: Aunt Inez's Monkey Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 can Refrigerated biscuits (10 per can) cut in quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the cut-up biscuits in sugar and cinnamon.
2. Arrange them in a greased tube pan with a sealed bottom, covering the base of the pan.
3. Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon mixture evenly over the biscuits.
4. Pour melted margarine over the top.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30-40 minutes.
Source: Inez Walling
